repo.description: Fault tolerant job scheduler for Mesos which handles dependencies and ISO8601 based schedules

terms.context_snippet: Chronos is a replacement for `cron`. It is a distributed and fault-tolerant scheduler that runs on top of [Apache Mesos][mesos] that can be used for job orchestration. It supports custom Mesos executors as well
